issues.description: Target must filter for {Revolutionary Army} type. Current scope 'ChooseOwnCharacter' lacks type filter. Should be scope with filter or additionalFilters for type.
Action is mandatory in text ('You may') but DSL structure lacks optional/conditional wrapper. Should include condition or optional flag.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect for '[During this turn]' phrasing. Should be 'DuringYourTurn' to reflect temporary power boost that lasts through current turn only.
